name: Black-Bottom Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract to the mixture. Beat until thoroughly combined.
3. Blend in the mashed bananas until just mixed.
4. Sift together the baking powder, baking soda, sodium bicarbonate, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture and mix well.
6. Divide the batter into two equal parts.
7. Add the baking cocoa to one half of the batter. Spread this portion in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
8. Spoon the remaining batter over the cocoa layer and swirl with a knife using gentle, smooth motions.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until the bars are set when tested.
10. Allow to cool before serving.
